persons.arguments_against: One continuous career, initials R.S. throughout. The entry traces Palestine civil administration (district officer) from 1920, secondment to Aden as political/protectorate secretary 1928-34, then governor and commander-in-chief of Aden 1944 — matched exactly by the Palestine 1923, Aden 1929, and Aden 1946 stints, the last carrying the K.C.M.G.(1946) and O.B.E.(1934). No competing R. S. Champion exists.
persons.would_overturn: A second same-surname person serving the same colony in the same years and offices, or a printed birth/death date excluding these years.

notes: production high-value slice batch 3, hand-adjudicated (Claude Code, in-session)
